groups.name: Carboxylic Acid
groups.summary: Broad acid O-H plus carbonyl and C-O support.

groups.name: Amide
groups.summary: Amide I carbonyl reinforced by N-H and amide II.

groups.name: Primary Amide
groups.summary: Primary amide with NH₂ doublet, amide I, and amide II support.

groups.name: Secondary Amide
groups.summary: Secondary amide with one N-H stretch and amide III support.

groups.name: Ester
groups.summary: Strong ester carbonyl plus C-O band.

groups.name: Aldehyde
groups.summary: Aldehyde carbonyl supported by aldehydic C-H doublet.

groups.name: Ketone
groups.summary: Carbonyl without acid/amide/aldehyde-specific support.

groups.name: Alcohol
groups.summary: Broad O-H band with supporting C-O absorption.

groups.name: Primary Alcohol
groups.summary: Broad O-H band with primary-alcohol C-O stretch near 1085–1050 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Secondary Alcohol
groups.summary: Broad O-H band with secondary-alcohol C-O stretch near 1124–1087 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Tertiary Alcohol
groups.summary: Broad O-H with tertiary-alcohol C-O support at higher wavenumber.

groups.name: Phenol
groups.summary: Phenolic O-H with aromatic-ring support and Ar-OH bend.

groups.name: Amine
groups.summary: Primary/secondary amine N-H with supporting bend and C-N.

groups.name: Primary Amine
groups.summary: Primary amine with NH₂ stretch pair, NH₂ bend, and aliphatic C-N support.

groups.name: Secondary Amine
groups.summary: Secondary amine with single N-H stretch, N-H bend, and secondary-amine C-N support.

groups.name: Aliphatic Hydrocarbon
groups.summary: General sp³ C-H pattern supported by CH₂ and CH₃ deformations.

groups.name: Methylene-rich Alkyl
groups.summary: CH₂-dominant alkyl pattern with strong paired methylene stretches.

groups.name: Methyl-rich Alkyl
groups.summary: CH₃-dominant alkyl pattern with methyl bends and stretches.

groups.name: Isopropyl Group
groups.summary: Isopropyl motif supported by the 1380 cm⁻¹ bend and 1170 cm⁻¹ skeletal band.

groups.name: tert-Butyl Group
groups.summary: tert-Butyl motif marked by the 920–935 cm⁻¹ tert-butyl band and methyl-rich support.

groups.name: Long-chain n-Alkyl
groups.summary: Long methylene sequence supported by the CH₂ rocking band near 720 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Carboxylate
groups.summary: Paired asymmetric and symmetric COO⁻ stretches.

groups.name: Oxime
groups.summary: C=N–OH motif with C=N and N-O support.

groups.name: Nitrile
groups.summary: Sharp C≡N band near 2260–2220 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Nitro
groups.summary: Paired asymmetric and symmetric NO₂ absorptions.

groups.name: Alkene
groups.summary: C=C stretch with supporting =C-H above 3000 cm⁻¹.

bands.label: Terminal alkene vinyl oop high marker
Terminal alkene vinyl oop low marker

groups.name: Terminal Alkene
groups.summary: Terminal alkene with characteristic vinyl out-of-plane pair.

bands.label: Terminal alkene vinyl oop high band
Terminal alkene vinyl oop low band

coherence_rules.label: Terminal alkene vinyl oop pair coherence

groups.name: Vinylidene Alkene
groups.summary: Vinylidene / exocyclic methylene with a strong ~890 cm⁻¹ oop marker.

groups.name: Trans Disubstituted Alkene
groups.summary: Trans-disubstituted alkene with a strong ~965 cm⁻¹ out-of-plane band.

groups.name: Cis Disubstituted Alkene
groups.summary: Cis-disubstituted alkene with a low-frequency oop band and cis in-plane bend.

groups.name: Trisubstituted Alkene
groups.summary: Trisubstituted alkene with a characteristic oop band near 790–850 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Aromatic Ring
groups.summary: Ring stretches with aromatic C-H and out-of-plane support.

groups.name: Benzene
groups.summary: Unsubstituted benzene ring with the characteristic ~670 cm⁻¹ out-of-plane band.

groups.name: Monosubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: Monosubstituted benzene out-of-plane pair with aromatic ring support.

groups.name: Ortho-disubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: Ortho-disubstituted aromatic ring with a strong 1,2-pattern oop band.

groups.name: Meta-disubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: Meta-disubstituted benzene pattern with three characteristic oop bands.

groups.name: Para-disubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: Para-disubstituted aromatic ring with a strong band near 810 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: 1,2,4-Trisubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: 1,2,4-Trisubstituted aromatic ring with 875/810/700 cm⁻¹ oop pattern.

groups.name: 1,2,3-Trisubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: 1,2,3-trisubstituted aromatic ring with low and mid out-of-plane bands.

groups.name: 1,3,5-Trisubstituted Benzene
groups.summary: 1,3,5-trisubstituted aromatic ring with low and high out-of-plane bands.

groups.name: Terminal Alkyne
groups.summary: Sharp ≡C-H near 3300 with weak C≡C support.

groups.name: Acid Halide
groups.summary: High-frequency acyl halide carbonyl without broad O-H support.

groups.name: Anhydride
groups.summary: Diagnostic paired anhydride carbonyl bands at high frequency.

groups.name: Aliphatic Ether
groups.summary: Strong C-O stretch without OH or carbonyl evidence.

groups.name: Aryl Ether
groups.summary: Aryl ether C-O stretch reinforced by aromatic ring evidence.

groups.name: Amine Salt
groups.summary: Broad ammonium N-H stretch with NH₃⁺ bending support.

groups.name: Aromatic Amine
groups.summary: Aromatic amine C-N stretch with N-H and ring support.

groups.name: Azide
groups.summary: Isolated strong azide stretch in the 2120–2160 cm⁻¹ region.

groups.name: Isocyanate
groups.summary: Strong N=C=O stretch with optional lower-frequency NCO support.

groups.name: Thiocyanate
groups.summary: Sharp thiocyanate band slightly above the azide region.

groups.name: Allene
groups.summary: Allene cumulene stretch in the overtone-free 1925–1990 cm⁻¹ window.

groups.name: Thiol
groups.summary: Weak but diagnostic S-H stretch around 2550–2600 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Sulfoxide
groups.summary: Very strong sulfoxide S=O stretch near 1030–1070 cm⁻¹.

groups.name: Sulfone
groups.summary: Characteristic SO₂ doublet with strong high- and low-frequency components.

groups.name: Sulfonamide
groups.summary: Sulfonamide SO₂ pair supported by N-H stretching.

groups.name: Sulfonyl Chloride
groups.summary: Sulfonyl chloride SO₂ pair at higher frequency than sulfones.

groups.name: Carbodiimide
groups.summary: Sharp N=C=N absorption in the narrow 2145–2120 cm⁻¹ window.

groups.name: Isothiocyanate
groups.summary: Strong N=C=S band in the 2140–1990 cm⁻¹ region.

groups.name: Sulfate
groups.summary: Paired sulfate SO₃ stretches at high and mid frequency.

groups.name: Sulfonate
groups.summary: Characteristic sulfonate SO₃ pair with separated high and low bands.

groups.name: Vinyl Ether
groups.summary: Vinyl ether C-O band supported by alkene evidence.

coherence_rules.label: Vinyl ether C-O + vinyl bend coherence
